economic_notes: First Nation is working on a windtower project under Economic Development. Operations include aquaculture (oysters), fisheries, tobacco and fuel sales, boat shop and consulting.
notes: Consolidated entity includes: Indian Island First Nation Government Administration, Indian Island First Nation Trust Funds, Indian Island Acquaculture Development Corporation, Indian Island Economic Development Corporation, and Indian Island First Nation Consulting Corporation (4 subsidiaries plus trust funds). Net debt position of -988,771. Cash position is a bank overdraft of 244,808. Budget figures are unaudited per note 25. Lease receivable of 189,000 maturing 2025. Ottawa Trust Moneys balance of 833 held by federal government. Oyster inventory decreased significantly from 725,381 to 327,637. Major capital additions of 5,277,304 during the year. Provincial government transfers for capital of 843,567 appear to be a new revenue stream (nil in 2023). ISC funding calculated from note 4 accounts receivable disclosure.
